---
title: "Data catalog"
subtitle: "Every committed snapshot, with its vintage, row count, and SHA — auto-refreshed on each site build."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

This page is a live inventory of every Parquet snapshot the repository's pipelines commit to `data/processed/`. Every row below is read at render time from the pipeline's own manifest or the Parquet file itself — nothing here is hand-maintained. If a row shows `(missing)`, the next scheduled run of that pipeline will fill it in.

## License

All derived snapshots on this page are licensed under **CC BY 4.0** (see [`LICENSE-DATA.md`](https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/LICENSE-DATA.md)). Attribution expected:

> Livestock Marketing Alternatives Explorer. [Year]. [URL]. Licensed under CC BY 4.0.

Underlying government data (USDA-AMS, BLS) is U.S. public domain.

## Current snapshots

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: catalog-table

from pathlib import Path
import json
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown

PROCESSED = Path("..") / "data" / "processed"

# Every row describes one "series" in the catalog. Each series has a pointer
# to its Parquet, its pipeline / workflow / methodology pages, and optionally
# a pointer to its manifest (for vintage stamps and SHA-256).
CATALOG = [
    {
        "title": "BLS CPI-U (monthly)",
        "parquet": "cpi_latest.parquet",
        "vintage_column": "period",
        "manifest": "MANIFEST.json",
        "pipeline_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/tree/main/pipelines/bls",
        "workflow_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/.github/workflows/bls_cpi_refresh.yml",
        "methodology_url": "methodology/cpi.qmd",
        "description": "CPI-U, All Items, U.S. City Average, NSA (CUUR0000SA0). Monthly series.",
    },
    {
        "title": "Clovis Livestock Auction — MARS-era (weekly, rolling)",
        "parquet": "clovis_latest.parquet",
        "vintage_column": "auction_date",
        "manifest": "clovis_MANIFEST.json",
        "pipeline_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/tree/main/pipelines/clovis",
        "workflow_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/.github/workflows/clovis_refresh.yml",
        "methodology_url": "methodology/clovis.qmd",
        "description": "USDA-AMS MARS slug AMS_1781. Feeder-cattle $/cwt, all frame/muscle-grade combinations preserved. Apr 2019–present.",
    },
    {
        "title": "Clovis Livestock Auction — Era B historical (one-time)",
        "parquet": "clovis_historical_era_b_latest.parquet",
        "vintage_column": "auction_date",
        "manifest": "clovis_historical_MANIFEST.json",
        "pipeline_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/tree/main/pipelines/clovis_historical",
        "workflow_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/.github/workflows/clovis_refresh.yml",
        "methodology_url": "methodology/clovis.qmd",
        "description": "USDA-AMS Market News per-slug archive (CV_LS750 fixed-width TXT). Oct 2017 – Apr 2019. Read-only after one-time ingest; chart pages read this together with the rolling MARS-era parquet via pipelines/clovis/load.py.",
    },
    {
        "title": "CME GF feeder-cattle daily settles (one-time bootstrap)",
        "parquet": "cme_feeders_latest.parquet",
        "vintage_column": "date",
        "manifest": "cme_feeders_MANIFEST.json",
        "pipeline_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/tree/main/pipelines/cme_feeders",
        "workflow_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/.github/workflows/clovis_refresh.yml",
        "methodology_url": "methodology/basis.qmd",
        "description": "CME GF (Feeder Cattle) daily settle prices for eight contract months (JAN/MAR/APR/MAY/AUG/SEP/OCT/NOV) plus an auto-rolled Nearby column. Long-format (one row per date × contract_month). Bootstrap source is a third-party settle workbook; Phase-2 follow-on refreshes from CME directly.",
    },
    {
        "title": "Clovis basis (derived: Clovis cash − CME settle)",
        "parquet": "clovis_basis_latest.parquet",
        "vintage_column": "auction_date",
        "manifest": "clovis_basis_MANIFEST.json",
        "pipeline_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/pipelines/clovis/basis.py",
        "workflow_url": "https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/.github/workflows/clovis_refresh.yml",
        "methodology_url": "methodology/basis.qmd",
        "description": "Per-(auction_date, class, frame, muscle_grade, weight_break, contract_month) basis = head-weighted Clovis cash − CME settle. Three contract conventions surfaced: May, November, Nearby. Powers the Basis chart page.",
    },
]


def _describe_parquet(path: Path, vintage_col: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    if not path.exists():
        return {"rows": "_(missing)_", "date_range": "—", "columns": "—", "size": "—"}
    df = pd.read_parquet(path)
    size_kb = path.stat().st_size / 1024
    date_range = "—"
    if vintage_col in df.columns:
        s = pd.to_datetime(df[vintage_col])
        if not s.isna().all():
            date_range = f"{s.min().date()} → {s.max().date()}"
    return {
        "rows": f"{len(df):,}",
        "date_range": date_range,
        "columns": str(len(df.columns)),
        "size": f"{size_kb:,.1f} KB",
    }


def _describe_manifest(path: Path) -> dict[str, str]:
    if not path.exists():
        return {"vintage": "_(no manifest)_", "sha": "—", "written": "—", "n_vintages": "0"}
    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        m = json.load(f)
    entries = m.get("entries", [])
    if not entries:
        return {"vintage": "_(empty manifest)_", "sha": "—", "written": "—", "n_vintages": "0"}
    e = entries[-1]
    return {
        "vintage": f"`{e.get('vintage','—')}`",
        "sha": f"`{(e.get('sha256') or '')[:12]}…`",
        "written": e.get("written_at_utc", "—"),
        "n_vintages": str(len(entries)),
    }


blocks = []
for spec in CATALOG:
    pq_path = PROCESSED / spec["parquet"]
    mf_path = PROCESSED / spec["manifest"]
    pq_info = _describe_parquet(pq_path, spec["vintage_column"])
    mf_info = _describe_manifest(mf_path)
    block = (
        f"### {spec['title']}\n\n"
        f"{spec['description']}\n\n"
        f"| Field | Value |\n"
        f"|---|---|\n"
        f"| **File** | [`{spec['parquet']}`](../data/processed/{spec['parquet']}) |\n"
        f"| **Rows** | {pq_info['rows']} |\n"
        f"| **Columns** | {pq_info['columns']} |\n"
        f"| **File size** | {pq_info['size']} |\n"
        f"| **Time range** | {pq_info['date_range']} |\n"
        f"| **Latest vintage** | {mf_info['vintage']} |\n"
        f"| **Vintages committed** | {mf_info['n_vintages']} |\n"
        f"| **Snapshot SHA** | {mf_info['sha']} |\n"
        f"| **Last written (UTC)** | {mf_info['written']} |\n"
        f"| **Pipeline code** | [pipelines/]({spec['pipeline_url']}) |\n"
        f"| **Scheduled workflow** | [.github/workflows/]({spec['workflow_url']}) |\n"
        f"| **Methodology** | [{spec['methodology_url']}]({spec['methodology_url']}) |\n"
        f"| **Manifest** | [`{spec['manifest']}`](../data/processed/{spec['manifest']}) |\n"
    )
    blocks.append(block)

Markdown("\n\n".join(blocks))
```

## How to use these snapshots

### Direct download
Right-click any filename in the tables above and save it, or open its URL directly. Parquet is the canonical format; most tools read it natively (Python via `pd.read_parquet`, R via `arrow::read_parquet`, DuckDB, Polars).

### Stable citation (a specific vintage)
Cite by the manifest's SHA-256. Every committed vintage has one, and the manifest is append-only — a SHA you cite today will still resolve to the same bytes later. If you need DOI-class persistence, the Phase 2 plan includes an annual Zenodo deposit with citeable DOIs.

### Reproducing a figure on this site
Every chart on the site reads from `*_latest.parquet`. To reproduce what you see, `git clone` the repo and `pip install -r pipelines/requirements.txt`; every `.qmd` file names the Parquet file it reads in its first code cell.

## Planned additions (Phase 2 candidates)

These are discussed in the platform's roadmap but are not yet scheduled. They appear here to make the absence explicit rather than pretend the current catalog is comprehensive.

| Series | Likely source | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| Pre-2017 Clovis history | Direct request to USDA-AMS Market News | Extends the public series before October 2017, the floor of the Market News per-slug archive. Aspirational; depends on whether AMS will provide a machine-readable archive. |
| Willcox, AZ auction | USDA-AMS Market News | Companion auction in the broader four-corners marketing area. |
| Utah feeder auctions | USDA-AMS Market News | Regional comparison within the 4-corners marketing area. |
| CME feeder-cattle basis | Derived from Clovis + CME settles | Basis statistics (cash minus nearby futures) for hedge-decision support. Raw futures data stays link-out only per the data license; published output is the derived basis statistic, not the futures price. |
| USDA NASS QuickStats | NASS API | State/county inventory, production, disappearance. |

## The data folder, laid out

```
data/
├── raw/
│   ├── bls/           # raw BLS JSON payloads (gitignored)
│   └── clovis/        # raw MARS JSON payloads (gitignored)
└── processed/
    ├── cpi_latest.parquet          # BLS, newest vintage
    ├── cpi_<YYYY-MM>.parquet       # BLS, historical vintages
    ├── MANIFEST.json               # BLS manifest (vintages + SHAs)
    ├── clovis_latest.parquet       # Clovis, newest vintage
    ├── clovis_weekly_<date>.parquet  # Clovis, historical vintages
    └── clovis_MANIFEST.json        # Clovis manifest
```

Raw API payloads are kept out of git because they are large debugging artifacts and redundant with the processed snapshots. Processed snapshots, manifests, and release artifacts are all committed.
